Usage:
  circleci pipeline trigger [flags]

Examples:
# Trigger a pipeline on the current branch
$ circleci pipeline trigger

# Trigger on a specific branch
$ circleci pipeline trigger --branch main

# Trigger with pipeline parameters
$ circleci pipeline trigger --parameter deploy_env=staging --parameter run_e2e=true

# Output the triggered pipeline as JSON
$ circleci pipeline trigger --json


Flags:
  -b, --branch string           Branch to trigger (defaults to current branch)
      --json                    Output the triggered pipeline as JSON
      --parameter stringArray   Pipeline parameter as key=value (repeatable)
      --project string          Project slug (e.g. gh/org/repo); defaults to git remote

Global Flags:
  -q, --quiet   suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected
